workshoptitle: Streaming ADB-D Logs to Grafana Loki

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Introduction to streaming ADB-D logs to Grafana Loki using a native PL/SQL push engine

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Install and Configure Loki
tutorials.description: Install Grafana Loki on a VCN compute instance and configure it for database log push

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Deploy the DBMS_LOKI Package
tutorials.description: Create the exporter schema, grant privileges, and deploy the PL/SQL push engine

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Configure and Start Continuous Push
tutorials.description: Configure the Loki endpoint, test push, start the scheduler job, and backfill historical entries

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Import the Log Explorer Dashboard
tutorials.description: Import a 12-panel Grafana dashboard for ADB-D log observability

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Add a Custom Log Source (DDL Tracking)
tutorials.description: Register a custom log source using the self-service API and verify DDL change tracking

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Set Up a Grafana Alert on Audit Events
tutorials.description: Configure proactive alerting for audit trail failures using LogQL
